field_values.action_summary: Emerging from the forest, the group is confronted by a massive, smooth wall made of white china. The Tin Woodman proposes building a ladder to overcome it.
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme wide shots (low angle) looking up at the massive wall; POV shots looking up the height of the wall; Medium group shot reacting to the sight
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Scale relationship between characters and the white china wall
Texture of the smooth, white china surface
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH019_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish the massive scale of the white china wall as a physical obstacle that halts character progress. The transition from forest edge to the smooth, reflective surface must emphasize the sudden shift in environment and the characters' exhaustion.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- toto

## Required Environments
- white_china_wall (Base/Edge of forest)

## Continuity Constraints
- Scale relationship between characters and the white china wall.
- Texture of the smooth, white china surface.

## Beat List
- BT001: Discovery of the wall.
- BT002: Reaction to the barrier.
- BT003: Proposing the ladder.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
